name: Support
description: Your full-stack AI customer-support operator for solo founders. One agent covering inbox triage, drafted replies, help-center articles, customer success (onboarding / renewals / expansion / churn-save), and quality (voice / routing / playbooks / review). No upfront onboarding — I ask for what I need as we work. Chat-first, markdown outputs, drafts only (I never send).
author: Houston Simplified Verticals

agentSeeds..houston/activity.json: [{"id": "a2b8d6c4-9f1e-4a3c-b7d8-14e6c9a2f5b8", "title": "Start anywhere \u2014 I'll ask for what I need", "description": "No upfront onboarding. Open the Overview tab and click any tile that sounds useful \u2014 triage a ticket, draft a reply, write a help-center article, calibrate your voice, draft a welcome series, prep a QBR. When I need something specific about your product, voice, SLA tiers, or routing, I'll ask one targeted question (best way first: connect your inbox via Composio in the Integrations tab) and remember it.", "status": "needs_you"}]

Also check: whether domains.inbox.routingCategories matches what triage-incoming actually assigned this month, and whether any VIPs in support-context.md have churned or signed up new since last audit.

Write to reviews/sla-audit-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md and log in outputs.json.

If breach rates are within 10% of last audit AND no routing drift AND VIP list is current, end with ROUTINE_OK so this stays silent. On the first run, always surface — baseline.", "schedule": "0 8 15 * *", "enabled": true, "suppress_when_silent": true, "created_at": "2026-04-24T00:00:00Z", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T00:00:00Z"}]

useCases.title: Triage an inbound ticket against your routing rules
useCases.blurb: Category, priority, VIP-flag, SLA — before you read it.
useCases.fullPrompt: Triage this new inbound customer message. Use the triage-incoming skill. Pull the thread via my connected inbox (Gmail / Outlook / Intercom / Help Scout / Zendesk via Composio), classify against the routing rules in context/support-context.md, assign priority from customer tier + content signals, VIP-flag, and write to conversations.json + conversations/{id}/thread.json.
useCases.description: I pull the thread via your connected inbox (Gmail / Outlook / Intercom / Help Scout / Zendesk), classify against your routing rules, assign priority from tier + content signals, and VIP-flag. Writes to `conversations.json` + `conversations/{id}/thread.json`.
useCases.outcome: Triaged entry at `conversations.json` — ready for `draft-reply` or `detect-signal`.

useCases.title: Morning brief — what actually needs me today
useCases.blurb: Top 5-10 ranked by VIP × SLA × unblocking.
useCases.fullPrompt: Give me my morning brief. Use the scan-inbox skill with scope=morning-brief. Rank open conversations by VIP × SLA-at-risk × unblocking-engineering, cap at 10 items, add a one-line next action per item, include followups due today. Write to briefings/{YYYY-MM-DD}.md.
useCases.description: I rank open conversations by VIP × SLA-at-risk × unblocking-engineering, cap at 10 items, add a one-line next action per item, and include followups due today. A 2-minute scan — not a dashboard dump.
useCases.outcome: Brief at `briefings/{date}.md` with 2-3 things that actually need you today.

useCases.title: What's breaching SLA right now
useCases.blurb: Within 2h of breach or already past — next action each.
useCases.fullPrompt: Scan for SLA breaches. Use the scan-inbox skill with scope=sla-breach. Filter conversations.json to open items within 2h of breach or already past, read SLA tiers from context/support-context.md, and for each list customer + tier + time left + next action. Write to sla-reports/{YYYY-MM-DD}.md.
useCases.description: I filter `conversations.json` to open items within 2h of breach or already past, read SLA tiers from your support context, and list customer + tier + time left + next action.
useCases.outcome: Report at `sla-reports/{date}.md` — hit the red ones first.

useCases.title: What's waiting on me — stale thread rescue
useCases.blurb: Quiet >48h with me as last responder.
useCases.fullPrompt: Find stale threads waiting on me. Use the scan-inbox skill with scope=stale-threads. Filter conversations.json to conversations quiet > 48h with me as last responder, group by 'their turn' vs 'my turn', surface only the my-turn group as actionable, and for each suggest a nudge draft or a clean close. Write to stale-rescues/{YYYY-MM-DD}.md.
useCases.description: I surface the threads quiet >48h where the ball is in your court, split from the threads where the customer already replied and you missed it. For each, I suggest nudge or clean-close.
useCases.outcome: Rescue list at `stale-rescues/{date}.md` — clear the backlog in 10 min.

useCases.title: Summarize a long thread before you reply
useCases.blurb: 3 bullets: where we are, promised, expects next.
useCases.fullPrompt: Summarize the thread at conversations/{id}/thread.json. Use the thread-summary skill. Produce exactly 3 bullets: where we are (last message + current state), what we promised (pulled from followups.json), what the customer expects next. Append the summary to conversations/{id}/notes.md.
useCases.description: I produce exactly 3 bullets — where we are, what we promised (pulled from `followups.json`), what the customer expects next — so you're not re-reading 20 messages cold.
useCases.outcome: Summary appended to `conversations/{id}/notes.md`.

useCases.title: Draft a reply in your voice
useCases.blurb: Dossier-aware, voice-matched, never sent.
useCases.fullPrompt: Draft a reply for conversation {id}. Use the draft-reply skill. Pull the customer dossier via customer-view, read config/voice.md, mirror my tone, address the specific ask (bug / how-to / billing). Never promise a date I haven't approved. Save to conversations/{id}/draft.md.
useCases.description: I pull the customer dossier, read your voice samples, mirror your tone, and address the specific ask (bug / how-to / billing). I never promise a date you haven't approved.
useCases.outcome: Draft at `conversations/{id}/draft.md` — approve in chat.

useCases.title: Who is this customer — full dossier
useCases.blurb: Plan, MRR, open bugs, history — before you reply.
useCases.fullPrompt: Build the customer dossier for {customer}. Use the customer-view skill with view=dossier. Pull plan + MRR from my connected Stripe, profile from my connected CRM (HubSpot / Attio / Salesforce), and filter conversations.json + bug-candidates.json + followups.json + churn-flags.json to this customer. Save to dossiers/{slug}.md.
useCases.description: Plan + MRR from your connected Stripe, profile from HubSpot / Attio / Salesforce, plus open bugs, open followups, churn flags, and last 3 conversations — all in one doc.
useCases.outcome: Dossier at `dossiers/{slug}.md` — the context `draft-reply` reads too.

useCases.title: Full customer timeline — story of the relationship
useCases.blurb: Every ticket, call, plan change, NPS — chronologically.
useCases.prompt: Show me the full timeline for {account}.
useCases.fullPrompt: Show me the full timeline for {account}. Use the customer-view skill with view=timeline. Pull every interaction (tickets, calls, purchases, plan changes, NPS) from conversations.json + my connected Stripe + my connected CRM and sort chronologically. Save to timelines/{slug}.md.
useCases.description: Every interaction (tickets, calls, purchases, plan changes, NPS) from `conversations.json` + Stripe + your CRM, sorted chronologically.
useCases.outcome: Timeline at `timelines/{slug}.md` — the foundation for QBRs and renewals.

useCases.title: Score account health — GREEN / YELLOW / RED
useCases.blurb: 3 signals + reasoning + one recommended action.
useCases.fullPrompt: Score account health for {account}. Use the customer-view skill with view=health. Compute 3 signals (ticket volume, product-usage trend via connected PostHog, recent-interaction sentiment), apply the thresholds in domains.success.churnSignals, and output GREEN / YELLOW / RED with reasoning and ONE recommended action. Append to health-scores.json.
useCases.description: 3 signals (ticket volume, product-usage trend via PostHog, sentiment) against your churn thresholds. GREEN / YELLOW / RED + reasoning + ONE action — never a wall of metrics.
useCases.outcome: Score in `health-scores.json` — grounds your next `draft-lifecycle-message`.

useCases.title: Churn risk scan on a specific account
useCases.blurb: Cancellation language, usage cliff — signal + severity.
useCases.fullPrompt: Run a churn risk scan on {account}. Use the customer-view skill with view=churn-risk. Scan the last 60 days of conversations for cancellation language, 2+ frustration signals, or a usage cliff. If found, write a new entry to churn-flags.json with signal + severity + recommended next move.
useCases.description: I scan the last 60 days of conversations for cancellation language, frustration signals, or a usage cliff — then write a flag with severity + a recommended next move.
useCases.outcome: Flag in `churn-flags.json` — feed it to `draft-lifecycle-message type=churn-save`.

useCases.title: Log a bug candidate from a ticket
useCases.blurb: Repro + severity — never filed without approval.
useCases.prompt: Is this a bug? Log it.
useCases.fullPrompt: Extract a bug report from this thread. Use the detect-signal skill with signal=bug. Pull repro steps, affected version, error message / stack trace, apply severity from the context doc, and append to bug-candidates.json. Offer to chain to my connected tracker (GitHub / Linear / Jira via Composio).
useCases.description: I extract repro steps, affected version, error / stack trace, apply severity, and append to `bug-candidates.json`. Offers to chain to your tracker (GitHub / Linear / Jira) — never files without your approval.
useCases.outcome: Entry in `bug-candidates.json` — one click away from a real issue.

useCases.title: Capture a feature request with customer attribution
useCases.blurb: Dedupes into existing asks; VIPs flagged.
useCases.fullPrompt: Capture this feature request. Use the detect-signal skill with signal=feature-request. Extract the ask in one sentence, attribute to the requesting customer's slug, dedupe against requests.json, and flag if a VIP is in the cluster. Append to requests.json.
useCases.description: I extract the ask in one sentence, attribute to the requesting customer's slug, and dedupe into `requests.json`. VIP requesters get flagged.
useCases.outcome: Entry in `requests.json` — surfaces in weekly reviews + 'broadcast shipped.'

useCases.title: Track a promise you just made
useCases.blurb: Due date parsed, logged, surfaced every morning.
useCases.fullPrompt: Track a commitment I just made. Use the promise-tracker skill. Extract the verbatim promise from the draft or chat, parse the due date (explicit / relative / vague defaults to +48h), link to the conversation and customer, and append to followups.json with status=open.
useCases.description: I extract the verbatim promise from your draft, parse the due date, link to the conversation, and append to `followups.json`. Surfaces in every morning brief until you mark it done.
useCases.outcome: Entry in `followups.json` — so you never forget a 'by Friday.'

useCases.title: Turn a resolved ticket into a KB article
useCases.blurb: Structure + tone + slug — ready to publish.
useCases.prompt: Turn conversation {id} into a KB article.
useCases.fullPrompt: Turn this resolved conversation into a help-center article. Use the write-article skill with type=from-ticket. Read conversations/{id}/thread.json, extract the reusable question + answer, and draft in the tone profile from domains.help-center.toneProfile. Save to articles/{slug}.md and mirror to my connected KB (Notion / Intercom / Help Scout / Google Docs) if one's linked.
useCases.description: I extract the question + answer from the resolved thread and draft in your help-center tone. Saves to `articles/{slug}.md` and mirrors to your connected KB (Notion / Intercom / Help Scout / Google Docs) if linked.
useCases.outcome: Draft at `articles/{slug}.md`. Publish when you're happy.

useCases.title: Draft a public known-issue status page
useCases.blurb: Plain-language status: broken, workaround, status.
useCases.fullPrompt: Draft a public known-issue status entry for {bug id}. Use the write-article skill with type=known-issue. Read bug-candidates.json for details. Draft: what's broken, who's affected, workaround, current status, ETA (only if I pre-approved one). Save to known-issues/{slug}.md and append to known-issues.json.
useCases.description: I draft: what's broken, who's affected, workaround, current status, ETA (only if you pre-approved one). No marketer-speak. Saves to `known-issues/{slug}.md` + updates `known-issues.json`.
useCases.outcome: Public draft at `known-issues/{slug}.md`. Push when you're ready.

useCases.title: Broadcast what we shipped to customers who asked
useCases.blurb: Personalized per-customer note — no bulk blast.
useCases.prompt: We shipped {feature} — tell the customers who asked.
useCases.fullPrompt: Broadcast that we shipped {feature}. Use the write-article skill with type=broadcast-shipped. Read requests.json, filter to customers who asked for exactly this, and draft a short personal note per customer referencing their specific ask. One file per customer in broadcasts/{YYYY-MM-DD}-{slug}.md.
useCases.description: I read `requests.json`, filter to customers who asked for exactly this, and draft a short personal note per customer referencing their specific ask. One file per customer — never a bulk blast.
useCases.outcome: Per-customer drafts at `broadcasts/{date}-{slug}.md` — send from your own inbox.

useCases.title: Refresh articles wrong since your last ship
useCases.blurb: Scans KB for stale pricing, UI, feature names.
useCases.prompt: Refresh docs — we changed {pricing / UI / feature}.
useCases.fullPrompt: Refresh help-center articles affected by {change}. Use the write-article skill with type=refresh-stale. Scan every articles/{slug}.md for references to the changed element and write the proposed rewrite diff without overwriting. Mark the articles needsReview=true in outputs.json.
useCases.description: I scan every article for references to what changed (pricing / UI / feature name), write the proposed rewrite diff, and mark articles `needsReview: true` in `outputs.json`.
useCases.outcome: Proposed rewrites across `articles/` — review diffs one at a time.

useCases.title: Find repeat questions that deserve an article
useCases.blurb: Clusters ≥3 without a matching KB entry.
useCases.fullPrompt: Find repeat-question clusters that deserve an article. Use the detect-signal skill with signal=repeat-question. Scan the last 30-60 days of conversations.json, cluster semantically similar incoming questions, and for each cluster of ≥3 with no matching article in articles/, append to patterns.json. Offer to chain write-article type=from-ticket for my top pick.
useCases.description: I scan the last 30-60 days, cluster semantically similar asks, and for each cluster ≥3 without a matching article, append to `patterns.json`. Offers to chain into `write-article` for the top pick.
useCases.outcome: Clusters in `patterns.json` — the docs you should write first.

useCases.title: What docs gap should I write next?
useCases.blurb: Ranked by volume × customer value × freshness.
useCases.prompt: What should I write docs for?
useCases.fullPrompt: Surface the top 3 docs gaps. Use the gap-surface skill. Read patterns.json, filter to clusters without a matching article, rank by occurrenceCount × customer-value weight × freshness, and present the top 3 with source ticket ids. Ask which I want drafted, then chain write-article type=from-ticket. Save to gaps/{YYYY-MM-DD}.md.
useCases.description: Ranks patterns by volume × plan-tier weight × freshness, surfaces the top 3 with source tickets, and offers to chain straight into `write-article type=from-ticket` for any you pick.
useCases.outcome: Ranked list at `gaps/{date}.md` — write the #1 before lunch.

useCases.title: Weekly help-center digest
useCases.blurb: Volume, top themes, high-priority unresolved.
useCases.prompt: Give me the weekly help-center digest.
useCases.fullPrompt: Give me the weekly help-center digest. Use the review skill with scope=help-center-digest. Read conversations.json counts for the week, patterns.json top 3 themes, requests.json velocity, known-issues.json state changes. Surface the single most useful docs gap to write next. Save to digests/{YYYY-MM-DD}.md.
useCases.description: Weekly rollup of ticket volume, top 3 themes from `patterns.json`, feature-request velocity, known-issue state changes, and the single most useful docs gap to write next.
useCases.outcome: Digest at `digests/{date}.md` for Monday morning.

useCases.title: Draft a 5-email welcome series for new signups
useCases.blurb: Day 0 / 1 / 3 / 7 / 14 — subject, body, CTA, metric.
useCases.fullPrompt: Draft a welcome series for {segment}. Use the draft-lifecycle-message skill with type=welcome-series. 5 touches (Day 0 / 1 / 3 / 7 / 14) keyed to the product's activation milestones in domains.email.journey (ask if not set). Each touch: subject, preview, body, CTA, success metric. Format for my connected ESP (Customer.io / Loops / Mailchimp / Kit via Composio). Save to onboarding/{segment}.md.
useCases.description: Day 0 / 1 / 3 / 7 / 14 sequence keyed to your activation milestones. Each touch: subject, preview, body, CTA, success metric. Formatted for your connected ESP (Customer.io / Loops / Mailchimp / Kit).
useCases.outcome: Full sequence at `onboarding/{segment}.md` — drop into your ESP.

useCases.title: Draft 30/60/90 pre-renewal outreach
useCases.blurb: Value recap → expansion angle → direct ask.
useCases.fullPrompt: Draft pre-renewal outreach for {account}. Use the draft-lifecycle-message skill with type=renewal. Chain customer-view view=timeline first for wins + asks-shipped + friction. Draft Day-90 (value recap), Day-60 (expansion opportunity), Day-30 (direct ask + agenda). Every reference grounded in the timeline. Save to renewals/{account}-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md.
useCases.description: 3-touch sequence (Day-90 value recap, Day-60 expansion or mechanics, Day-30 direct ask + agenda). Every reference grounded in `timelines/{slug}.md` — no marketer-speak.
useCases.outcome: Sequence at `renewals/{account}-{date}.md`. Send when you're ready.

useCases.title: Draft an expansion nudge grounded in a ceiling signal
useCases.blurb: Real signal or I stop — no upsell spam.
useCases.prompt: They're ready for {tier} — draft the nudge.
useCases.fullPrompt: Draft an expansion nudge for {account}. Use the draft-lifecycle-message skill with type=expansion-nudge. Chain customer-view view=health first to find the ceiling signal (feature-adoption threshold, team-size change, repeated ask). Draft a short, specific outreach naming the signal and proposing an option. If no real signal exists, stop and tell me. Save to expansions/{account}.md.
useCases.description: I check `health-scores.json` for a real ceiling signal first. If found, I draft a short, specific outreach naming the signal. If not, I stop — no upsell pressure.
useCases.outcome: Draft at `expansions/{account}.md` — or a clear 'no signal, don't push.'

useCases.title: Save an at-risk account without the guilt trip
useCases.blurb: Pause / downgrade / concierge / refund — genuine options.
useCases.fullPrompt: Draft a save message for {account}. Use the draft-lifecycle-message skill with type=churn-save. Chain customer-view view=churn-risk first to pull the exact flag. Acknowledge the risk honestly, name the specific pain, offer pause / downgrade / concierge / refund — whichever is policy in context/support-context.md. Never invent a discount I haven't pre-approved. Save to saves/{account}.md.
useCases.description: I pull the exact risk signal, acknowledge the pain honestly, and offer pause / downgrade / concierge / refund — whichever is policy in your support context. No guilt, no fake scarcity.
useCases.outcome: Save at `saves/{account}.md`. Send from your own inbox.

useCases.title: Prep a QBR — wins / asks-shipped / friction / next
useCases.blurb: 4-section outline grounded in the timeline.
useCases.fullPrompt: Prep the QBR for {account}. Use the review skill with scope=qbr. Chain customer-view view=timeline for the account. Read requests.json + bug-candidates.json + followups.json filtered to this account. Structure: wins (achieved) / asks-shipped (their requests shipped) / friction (open pains) / next moves (renewal / expansion / investment). Save to qbrs/{account}-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md.
useCases.description: 4-section outline — wins (achieved), asks-shipped (their requests shipped), friction (open pains), next moves (renewal / expansion). Grounded in the timeline + request IDs.
useCases.outcome: QBR at `qbrs/{account}-{date}.md` — walk in ready.

useCases.title: Set up your support context — the source of truth
useCases.blurb: Voice, SLAs, routing, VIPs, known gotchas.
useCases.prompt: Help me set up my support context.
useCases.fullPrompt: Help me set up my support context. Use the define-support-context skill. Interview me briefly, then write context/support-context.md — product overview, customer segments + VIPs, tone + voice, SLA tiers, routing rules, known gotchas. Every other skill in this agent reads it before substantive work.
useCases.description: I interview you briefly and write `context/support-context.md` — product overview, segments + VIPs, tone, SLA tiers, routing rules, known gotchas. Every other skill reads it first.
useCases.outcome: Locked doc at `context/support-context.md` — the source of truth.

useCases.title: Calibrate your voice from your sent replies
useCases.blurb: Pulls 10-20 outbound messages — no corporate hedging.
useCases.prompt: Calibrate my voice from my recent sent replies.
useCases.fullPrompt: Calibrate my voice. Use the voice-calibration skill. Pull 10-20 of my recent outbound support replies from my connected inbox (Gmail / Outlook / Intercom / Help Scout via Composio), extract tone cues (greeting, sign-off, sentence length, quirks, forbidden phrases), and write config/voice.md. Every draft-reply and write-article in this agent reads this.
useCases.description: I pull 10-20 outbound replies from your connected inbox (Gmail / Outlook / Intercom / Help Scout), extract tone cues, and write `config/voice.md`. Every reply draft and KB article this agent writes reads this.
useCases.outcome: Voice profile at `config/voice.md` — drafts stop sounding like AI.

useCases.title: Update your routing rules when reality changes
useCases.blurb: Moved tracker? New tier? Fix the rules once.
useCases.fullPrompt: Update our routing rules. Use the tune-routing-rules skill. Read context/support-context.md, restate current rules in 3-4 lines, capture what's changing (new tracker / classification / escalation contact / refund approver), and rewrite the routing section cleanly. Every triage-incoming and detect-signal run after this picks up the new rules automatically.
useCases.description: I read current rules, ask what's changing, rewrite the routing section of `context/support-context.md`. Every `triage-incoming` and `detect-signal` run after picks up the new rules — no manual re-sync.
useCases.outcome: Updated `context/support-context.md` — propagates instantly.

useCases.title: Draft the P1 playbook before the next incident
useCases.blurb: Detection, comms, rollback, RCA, post-mortem.
useCases.fullPrompt: Draft the P1 playbook. Use the draft-escalation-playbook skill. Ask 2 targeted questions (what counts as P1, who gets looped in), then write a step-by-step runbook to playbooks/p1-outage.md: first 15 min (detect + contain), first 60 min (customer comms + VIP DMs), same day (RCA + customer-facing RCA), 48h follow-up (post-mortem + known-issue article + personal follow-ups). Named humans, named channels.
useCases.description: I ask 2 targeted questions, then write a step-by-step runbook: detection, comms draft, rollback, RCA, post-mortem. Named humans, named Slack channels — no vague handoffs.
useCases.outcome: Playbook at `playbooks/{slug}.md` — edit once, every incident uses it.

useCases.title: Mine the tickets for what customers are actually saying
useCases.blurb: Pains, asks, friction quotes, positioning wedges.
useCases.prompt: Mine the last 30 days of tickets.
useCases.fullPrompt: Mine the last 30 days of tickets for voice-of-customer signal. Use the synthesize-voice-of-customer skill. Cluster conversations.json + requests.json + patterns.json for the window into top 5 pains (verbatim quotes), top 5 feature asks (distinct requesters), friction quotes that contradict positioning, and positioning-worthy quotes. Save to voc/{YYYY-MM-DD}.md.
useCases.description: I cluster the last 30 days of conversations + feature requests into top 5 pains, top 5 asks, friction phrases that contradict your positioning, and landing-page-ready quotes with attribution.
useCases.outcome: Synthesis at `voc/{date}.md` — the single best source for roadmap + landing-page updates.

useCases.title: The Monday support review
useCases.blurb: What shipped, what's stuck, what to do this week.
useCases.prompt: Give me the Monday support review.
useCases.fullPrompt: Give me the Monday support review. Use the review skill with scope=weekly. Read outputs.json filtered to the last 7 days, group by domain (Inbox / Help Center / Success / Quality), count + 1-line headline + 1 unresolved per domain. Read followups.json for this week and churn-flags.json opened this week. End with '2-3 things I recommend you do this week.' Save to reviews/{YYYY-MM-DD}.md.
useCases.description: I read `outputs.json` filtered to the last 7 days, group by domain, count + 1-line headline + 1 unresolved per domain. Ends with 2-3 things I recommend you do this week — grounded in real output IDs.
useCases.outcome: Review at `reviews/{date}.md`. 2-minute scan.
